# Prompt Log — Harry Yachimba
**Project:** Threat Intelligence Feed Dashboard
**Team:** Jesus Alvarez, Harry Yachimba, Julian Silva-Erazo, Safayet Safin
**My Component:** AI Core / AI Summarizer & IOC Extractor
**AI Tools Used:** GitHub Copilot, Groq API, Flowise
---
## How to Use This Log
Add an entry for each significant AI interaction:
- Copilot Chat conversations where you asked it to generate, explain, or debug
something
- Moments where Copilot was wrong and you had to fix it (these are the most valuable
entries)
- Cases where you refined a prompt to get a better result
Don't log: every autocomplete of a bracket or variable name.
---
## 2026-05-21
**Context:** Working on the AI Threat Intelligence Feed Dashboard project in VS Code using GitHub Copilot. Focused on Component 2 AI Summarizer & IOC Extractor integration.
**Prompt:**
> Using the project context from copilot-instructions.md, write a complete README for my Component 2: AI Summarizer & IOC Extractor.
**Result:**
Copilot generated a structured markdown README including component purpose, inputs/outputs, technologies used, setup instructions, Airtable integration, and workflow examples.
**Evaluation:**
The response was mostly accurate, but some field names and integration details needed manual correction to match the actual Airtable schema and n8n workflows.
**What I Changed:**
Updated component descriptions, corrected Airtable field references, and clarified the Flowise integration process.
**What I Learned:**
More detailed project context in the prompt leads to more accurate Copilot-generated documentation.
